query: TG-43 parameters InterSource-125 seed dose rate constant radial dose function
citations: [Investigation of TG-43 Dosimetric Parameters for (192)Ir Brachytherapy Source Using GATE Monte Carlo Code.](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/37969149/)

evidence.claim:
PubMed ID: 37969149. 2023/07/01 00:00. PURPOSE: According to the revised Task Group number 43 recommendations, a 
brachytherapy source must be validated against a similar or identical source 
before i
evidence.source_title: Investigation of TG-43 Dosimetric Parameters for (192)Ir Brachytherapy Source Using GATE Monte Carlo Code.
evidence.raw_snippet:
PubMed ID: 37969149. 2023/07/01 00:00. PURPOSE: According to the revised Task Group number 43 recommendations, a 
brachytherapy source must be validated against a similar or identical source 
before its clinical application. The purpose of this investigation is to verify 
the dosimetric data of the high dose rate (HDR) BEBIG 192Ir source (Ir2.A).
MATERIALS AND METHODS: The HDR 192Ir encapsulated seed was simulated and its 
main dosimetric data were calculated using Geant4 Application for Tomogra
